THE COURT ORDERED THE WEDNESDAY'S ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO THE FOLLOWING DAY SO THAT IT WILL BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AS BRAYTON'S CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. THE 8/18/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/10. THE 10/20/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 10/21/10. THE 12/15/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 12/16/10. THE COURT CONFER WITH COUNSEL RE TIMELINES FOR DEMAND EXCHANGE. A HEARING IS SET FOR 5/13/10 AT 1:30P.M. IN DEPT. 206 FOR COMMENTS. RESPONSES ARE DUE BY 5/7/10 AND MAY BE FILED UNDER THE COMPLEX ASBESTOS LITIGATION, CASE #828684. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D.
